title: Indiabulls Real Estate is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Indiabulls Real Estate is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Bhubaneswar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
